sql_array: CREATE TABLE dates_test (id UInt32, date_number Int32, date_value Date, additional_info String);
INSERT INTO dates_test VALUES (1, 20230911, YYYYMMDDToDate(20230911), 'Test Entry 1');
INSERT INTO dates_test VALUES (2, 20210229, YYYYMMDDToDate(20210229), 'Test Entry 2');
INSERT INTO dates_test VALUES (3, 20231301, NULL, 'Invalid Date Entry');
INSERT INTO dates_test VALUES (4, 20220932, NULL, 'Another Invalid Entry');
INSERT INTO dates_test VALUES (5, NULL, NULL, 'Null Entry');
WITH temp_array AS (SELECT array(date_number) AS date_arr FROM dates_test) SELECT id, date_number, array(YYYYMMDDToDate(date_number)) AS converted_dates FROM dates_test WHERE date_number IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, date_value FROM dates_test WHERE additional_info LIKE '%Test%' GROUP BY id, date_value HAVING date_value >= '2022-01-01' AND date_value <= '2023-12-31';
SELECT id, array(YYYYMMDDToDate(date_number)) AS converted_dates FROM dates_test GROUP BY id HAVING arrayExists(x -> x IS NOT NULL, converted_dates);
SELECT id, array(YYYYMMDDToDate(20000101 + number) + INTERVAL number DAY) AS future_dates FROM numbers(10);
SELECT id, date_number, YYYYMMDDToDate(ifEmpty(toString(date_number), '20230301')) AS derived_date FROM dates_test WHERE toYYYYMMDD(date_value) <= 20230911;
